channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Offline Reinforcement Learning for Plasma Control in Nuclear Fusion: Codebase and Benchmark
item.description: Offline reinforcement learning benchmark RL4F provides evaluation environments and baselines for plasma control in nuclear fusion using historical tokamak data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MedicalRec: Medical recommender system for image classification without retraining
item.description: MedicalRec recommends optimal medical image classification models using a dataset of 5,000+ model records without requiring retraining.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SPIN: Decentralized Swarm Control via Tensorized Policy Coordination
item.description: SPIN framework enables decentralized multi-agent swarm control on edge devices by factorizing joint policies into tensor networks, reducing computational complexity from exponential to linear.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Boundary Variance Inflation Causes Acquisition Bias in Gaussian Processes
item.description: Kernel truncation at domain boundaries inflates Gaussian process variance, causing acquisition bias independent of task objectives.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Emergence via Phase Transitions: Mechanism Landscapes and Universal Convergence Across Complex Systems
item.description: Hierarchical Emergence Framework explains universal convergence of complex systems toward similar structures through phase transitions in mechanism landscapes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] STARIXNet: Multivariate and Multi-attribute Deep Learning Approach to Real-Time Resource Allocation in Cloud Platforms
item.description: STARIXNet uses multivariate metrics and spatio-temporal analysis for automated cloud resource allocation, demonstrating 10-50% cost savings at Walmart.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TriHead-GAN: A Generative Adversarial Network with Triple-Head Discriminator for Carbon Emission Time Series Generation
item.description: TriHead-GAN generates carbon emission time series data using a triple-head discriminator that supervises distributional authenticity, cross-variable correlations, and temporal smoothness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Enabling KV Caching of Shared Prefix for Diffusion Language Models
item.description: Researchers propose bicache to enable KV caching for diffusion language models, achieving 36-98% throughput improvement over existing techniques.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Should an AI Scientist Stop? Verifiable Experiment Steering and Refusal for Autonomous Discovery
item.description: CARTOGRAPH guides autonomous AI systems to refuse inadequate experiments through experiment steering and structural model-fit detection.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MST-Direct at Scale: Multivariate and Conditional Geostatistical Simulation via Sinkhorn Optimal Transport
item.description: MST-Direct scales optimal transport for multivariate and conditional geostatistical simulation, exactly preserving joint distributions and honoring observed data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Training-Inference Kernel Contracts: Bounding Divergence in Post-Training and Deployment
item.description: Kernel contracts framework bounds divergence between training-optimized and inference-optimized kernels in post-training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Customer Churn Prediction on Structured Data Using FT-Transformer and Stacking Ensembles
item.description: Hybrid model combining FT-Transformer and XGBoost via stacking improves customer churn prediction on structured data, achieving 62.10% F1.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Outage Detection in Self-Healing Smart Grids Using Reinforcement Learning with Spectral Graph Neural Networks
item.description: Researchers develop spectral graph neural networks with reinforcement learning to automatically optimize real-time power grid restoration during outages.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Human Guidance to Autonomy: Agent Skill System for End-to-End LLM Deployment on Spatial NPUs
item.description: Agent skill system autonomously deploys eight LLM models on AMD XDNA 2 NPUs, achieving 2.2x to 4x performance improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Routing Plateau: Understanding and Breaking the Accuracy Limits of LLM Routers
item.description: Study reveals LLM routing methods converge to a plateau caused by learning global trends instead of query-specific patterns; improvements need larger datasets and stronger encoders.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Optimality of Sequential Filtering Under Independent Cost and Selectivity Models
item.description: Researchers prove sequential filters should be ordered by cost-to-rejection-probability ratio to minimize total expected cost, outperforming heuristic approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ResearchClawBench: A Benchmark for End-to-End Autonomous Scientific Research
item.description: ResearchClawBench: A Benchmark for End-to-End Autonomous Scientific Research

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] UNIQ: Conformal Calibration for Adaptive Conservatism in Offline Reinforcement Learning
item.description: UNIQ: Conformal Calibration for Adaptive Conservatism in Offline Reinforcement Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Shortcuts in the Tail: Debiasing via Post-Hoc Spectral Compression of Fine-Tuning Updates
item.description: Shortcuts in the Tail: Debiasing via Post-Hoc Spectral Compression of Fine-Tuning Updates

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Repetition Mismatch: Why Data Mixture Experiments Don't Scale and How to Fix Them
item.description: Repetition Mismatch: Why Data Mixture Experiments Don't Scale and How to Fix Them

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Topological Characterization of Graph Neural Networks via Stochastic Block Model Embeddings on the n-Sphere
item.description: A Topological Characterization of Graph Neural Networks via Stochastic Block Model Embeddings on the n-Sphere

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DiffoR: A Unified Continuous Generative Framework for Universal Ordinal Regression
item.description: DiffoR: A Unified Continuous Generative Framework for Universal Ordinal Regression

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reachability and asymptotics of Gaussian Transformer dynamics
item.description: Reachability and asymptotics of Gaussian Transformer dynamics

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LFNO: Bridging Laplace and Fourier via Transient-Steady Decomposition
item.description: LFNO: Bridging Laplace and Fourier via Transient-Steady Decomposition

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sample-Efficient Post-Training for LEGO Spatial-Physics Reasoning
item.description: Sample-Efficient Post-Training for LEGO Spatial-Physics Reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MetaEvo: A Meta-Optimization Framework for Experience-Driven Agent Evolution
item.description: MetaEvo: A Meta-Optimization Framework for Experience-Driven Agent Evolution

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Contribution Weights: A Geometrical Analysis of Self-Attention Transformers
item.description: Contribution Weights: A Geometrical Analysis of Self-Attention Transformers

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SRT: Super-Resolution for Time Series via Disentangled Rectified Flow
item.description: SRT: Super-Resolution for Time Series via Disentangled Rectified Flow

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] QDSP: An Interpretable Structured Learning Framework for Predicting Death or Cerebral Palsy in Very Low Birth Weight Infants
item.description: QDSP: An Interpretable Structured Learning Framework for Predicting Death or Cerebral Palsy in Very Low Birth Weight Infants

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Position: Genomic Model Research Must Move Beyond Anecdotal Evaluation of Interpretability Methods
item.description: Position: Genomic Model Research Must Move Beyond Anecdotal Evaluation of Interpretability Methods

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Bidirectional Small-Granularity Search between Code and Text
item.description: Bidirectional Small-Granularity Search between Code and Text

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TinyJudge: Unverifiable Constraint Alignment via Lightweight Specialist Ensembles
item.description: TinyJudge: Unverifiable Constraint Alignment via Lightweight Specialist Ensembles

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluating Hallucinations in Domain-Adapted Large Language Models
item.description: Evaluating Hallucinations in Domain-Adapted Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Community-Specific Slang and Entity Detection via Semantic Shift in Fine-Tuned Language Models
item.description: Community-Specific Slang and Entity Detection via Semantic Shift in Fine-Tuned Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Retrieval Augmented Generation Framework for the Nepali Legal Domain Question Answering
item.description: Retrieval Augmented Generation Framework for the Nepali Legal Domain Question Answering

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ABLE: Representing and Mapping LLMs via Attribution-Based Large-model Embedding
item.description: ABLE: Representing and Mapping LLMs via Attribution-Based Large-model Embedding

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Implicit Causal Graph Construction in Text via Chain Discovery
item.description: Implicit Causal Graph Construction in Text via Chain Discovery

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] GraphLoRA: Structure-Aware Low-Rank Adaptation for Large Language Model Recommendation
item.description: GraphLoRA: Structure-Aware Low-Rank Adaptation for Large Language Model Recommendation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Post-training is (Massive) Supervised Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] BEACON: Behavioral Entropy Aggregation for Cross-Model Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
item.description: BEACON: Behavioral Entropy Aggregation for Cross-Model Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Finding New Connections between Concepts from Medline Database Incorporating Domain Knowledge

item.description: mllm-shap: A Shapley Value Explainability Platform for Text-Audio Multimodal Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Principled Agent Debate: Adversarial Arbitration for Sycophancy Reduction in Large Language Models
item.description: Principled Agent Debate: Adversarial Arbitration for Sycophancy Reduction in Large Language Models

item.description: From Architecture to Output: Structural Origins of Hallucination in Large Language Models and the Amplifying Role of Data

item.description: Finding Hidden Relationships Between Medical Concepts by Leveraging Metamap and Text Mining Techniques

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Function-Vector Heads Are Two Populations: Writers and Cancellers in In-Context Learning
item.description: Function-Vector Heads Are Two Populations: Writers and Cancellers in In-Context Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Subtitle-Aligned Fine-Tuning of Whisper for Swiss German ASR: Benchmark Contamination, Convention Mismatch, and an Honest Baseline at 25.6% WER (13.8% cWER)
item.description: Subtitle-Aligned Fine-Tuning of Whisper for Swiss German ASR: Benchmark Contamination, Convention Mismatch, and an Honest Baseline at 25.6% WER (13.8% cWER)
